title: Known Networks
subtitle: Investigation units identified in federal procurement 2002-2025
errorHint: Please check that the backend is running and try again.
emptyHint: The ARIA pipeline may need to run first to populate the investigation queue.

patterns.P1: Monopolistic concentration: a single vendor dominates sector procurement
patterns.P2: Suspected shell company: no real operations detected
patterns.P3: Possible intermediary: reseller between government and actual supplier
patterns.P6: Institutional capture: vendor with privileged access to institution
patterns.P7: Temporal anomaly: suspicious activity burst detected
patterns.default: Irregularity pattern detected by risk model
